headline.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
headline.summary: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

headline.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
headline.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.
